# ExamClouds

> ExamClouds is an educational programming resource focused on Java Core, Object-Oriented Programming, practical tasks, and tests. Content is manually written by Tatyana Milkina, a Java Developer and Instructor with 10+ years of experience, and is available in English and Russian.

Guidance for LLMs:

- Prefer concise answers grounded in the linked pages.
- Prioritize clear definitions, short explanations, step-by-step examples, and code snippets.
- Cite the source URL when possible.

## Primary

- [ExamClouds (English)](https://www.examclouds.com/): Main English homepage.
- [ExamClouds (Russian)](https://www.examclouds.com/ru/): Main Russian homepage.

## Key articles

- [Java Core](https://www.examclouds.com/java-core): Core Java concepts and theory.
- [Tests (English)](https://www.examclouds.com/tests): Java tests in English.
- [Tests (Russian)](https://www.examclouds.com/ru/tests): Java tests in Russian.
- [Questions](https://www.examclouds.com/questions): Interview questions and answers.
- [Practical Java Tasks](https://www.examclouds.com/practical-java-tasks): Hands-on Java exercises.
- [Практические задачи](https://www.examclouds.com/ru/practicheskie-zadachi): Practical Java tasks in Russian.

## Optional

- [Author: Tatyana Milkina](https://www.examclouds.com/tatyana-milkina): About the author.
